channel.title: Tech News Radio
channel.description: 毎朝10分で最新テックニュースをAIがお届け
channel.itunes:author: Studio Machikita

item.title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-22
item.description:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #015 (2026-03-22)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #015 - **日付**: 2026-03-22 - **尺**: 約 14 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=6097646) - [tinygrad: A simple and powerful neural network framework](https://tinygrad.org/#tinybox) - [Omnilingual MT: Machine Translation for 1,600 Languages | Research](https://ai.meta.com/research/publications/omnilingual-mt-machine-translation-for-1600-languages/?_fb_noscript=1)
### 注目の深掘り - [How ZJIT removes redundant object loads and stores](https://railsatscale.com/2026-03-18-how-zjit-removes-redundant-object-loads-and-stores/)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [Grafeo - High-Performance Graph Database](https://grafeo.dev/) - [Some Things Just Take Time](https://lucumr.pocoo.org/2026/3/20/some-things-just-take-time/)

## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [GitHub - MoonshotAI/Attention-Residuals](https://github.com/MoonshotAI/Attention-Residuals) - [OpenCode](https://opencode.ai/) - [France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app](https://www.lemonde.fr/en/international/article/2026/03/20/stravaleaks-france-s-aircraft-carrier-located-in-real-time-by-le-monde-through-fitness-app_6751640_4.html)

### 小ネタ・その他 - [VisiCalc reconstructed](https://zserge.com/posts/visicalc/) - [Show HN: I made an email app inspired by Arc browser](https://demo.define.app)

# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #013 (2026-03-20)

## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Astral to join OpenAI](https://astral.sh/blog/openai) - [10x Data Efficiency - NanoGPT Slowrun](https://qlabs.sh/10x) - [GitHub - KittenML/KittenTTS: State-of-the-art TTS model under 25MB 😻](https://github.com/KittenML/KittenTTS)
### 注目の深掘り - [From Oscilloscope to Wireshark](https://www.mattkeeter.com/blog/2022-08-11-udp/)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game](https://forums.tigsource.com/index.php?topic=40832.msg1363742#msg1363742) - [Employees had to restrain a dancing humanoid robot after it went wild at a California restaurant](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/19/restaurant-dancing-robot-went-wild-hot-pot-cupertino-haidilao-agibot/)

## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [2025 Turing award given for quantum information science](https://awards.acm.org/about/2025-turing) - [2025 Turing award given for quantum information science](https://www.wired.com/story/a-quantum-leap-for-the-turing-award/) - [Nothing CEO Carl Pei says smartphone apps will disappear as AI agents take their place](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/18/nothing-ceo-carl-pei-says-smartphone-apps-will-disappear-as-ai-agents-take-their-place/) - [Introducing the Machine Payments Protocol](https://stripe.com/blog/machine-payments-protocol)

## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Samsung bets this island startup can tame the grid with software and batteries](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/16/samsung-bets-this-island-startup-can-tame-the-grid-with-software-and-batteries/) - [Chamber | Your AIOps Teammate for GPU Infrastructure](https://www.usechamber.io/) - [Investing in Infrastructure: Meta’s Renewed Commitment to jemalloc](https://engineering.fb.com/2026/03/02/data-infrastructure/investing-in-infrastructure-metas-renewed-commitment-to-jemalloc/)

## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [DARPA's new X-76](https://www.darpa.mil/news/2026/darpa-new-x-76-speed-of-jet-freedom-of-helicopter) - [Things I've Done with AI](https://sjer.red/blog/2026/built-with-ai/) - [Things I've Done with AI](https://www.technologyreview.com/2026/03/06/1133989/the-download-10-things-that-matter-in-ai-anthropics-plan-sue-pentagon/) - [Rethinking Syntax: Binding by Adjacency](https://github.com/manifold-systems/manifold/blob/master/docs/articles/binding_exprs.md)

item.title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-08

## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [A roadmap for AI, if anyone will listen](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/07/a-roadmap-for-ai-if-anyone-will-listen/) - [SWE-CI: Evaluating Agent Capabilities in Maintaining Codebases via CI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.03823) - [How to run Qwen 3.5 locally](https://unsloth.ai/docs/models/qwen3.5)
### 注目の深掘り - [Show HN: Eyot, A programming language where the GPU is just another thread](https://cowleyforniastudios.com/2026/03/08/announcing-eyot/) - [Show HN: Eyot, A programming language where the GPU is just another thread](https://strlen.com/lobster/)
